scripts.bootstrap: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup:local: npm run hardhat:compile && npm run deploy:local
scripts.start:all: npm run check:ports && concurrently -n chain,backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run hardhat:node" "sh -c 'until curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8545 -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" -d \"{\\\"jsonrpc\\\":\\\"2.0\\\",\\\"method\\\":\\\"eth_chainId\\\",\\\"params\\\":[],\\\"id\\\":1}\" >/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; npm run deploy:local && npm run backend:dev'" "npm run frontend:dev"
